findings.title: Firewall rule allows any-any inbound
findings.description: Perimeter firewall contains an overly permissive any-any inbound rule exposing internal services.
findings.evidence: Rule #12: src any dst any allow

findings.title: Password policy allows reuse
findings.description: Domain policy permits reuse of the last password, weakening authenticator management.

findings.title: MFA disabled for VPN
findings.description: Remote access VPN allows single-factor authentication for all users.
